title: Implement Green Color Scheme
execution_steps: Step 1: Create a Color.kt file in the theme package defining the green color palette.
Step 2: Update Theme.kt to utilize the new green color scheme for both light and dark themes.
Step 3: Ensure sufficient contrast for readability per WCAG AA standards.
definition_of_done: Jetpack Compose theme definitions are updated with a green palette in Theme.kt and Color.kt.
Code builds successfully and aligns with NFR-001.
